zh.lifeSummary: Richard Hiscockes於1490年出生在英國維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯。他於1560年7月17日與Margeret Husdale在英國維爾爾拉可可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1570年在英國英格蘭維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉可可。

nameMeanings.name: Hiscockes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Hiscock with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hiscox
meanings: English (southwestern): variant of Hiscock , with the genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s re-spelt with -x.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Hiscockes was born in 1490, in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England. He married Margeret Husdale on 17 July 1560, in Lacock, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1570, in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Lacock, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Hiscockes est né en 1490, à All Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Margeret Husdale le 17 juillet 1560, à Lacock, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1570, à All Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Lacock, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hiscockesは1490年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアアル カニングズで生まれた。1560年7月17日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアラコックでMargeret Husdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1570年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアアル カニングズで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラコックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hiscockes(은)는 1490년 영국 윌츠히르 앨 캔잉스에서 태어났다. 그는 1560년 7월 17일 영국 윌츠히르 라콕에서 Margeret Husdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 앨 캔잉스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 라콕에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Hiscockes родился в 1490 г. в местности алл каннингс, уилцхир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Margeret Husdale 17 июля 1560 г. в местности лакокк, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1570 г. в местности алл каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности лакокк, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
